rules.name: Missing Primary Key
rules.recommendation: Add a primary key to ensure data integrity and enable efficient indexing
rules.sqlFix: ALTER TABLE [{schema}].[{tableName}] ADD CONSTRAINT PK_{tableName} PRIMARY KEY ([Id])

rules.name: Password Column Not Encrypted
rules.message: Column '{columnName}' in table '{tableName}' appears to store passwords without encryption
rules.recommendation: Use hashed passwords (bcrypt, PBKDF2) or encrypted columns. Never store plain text passwords.
rules.sqlFix:
-- Migrate to hashed passwords
-- 1. Add new column: ALTER TABLE [{tableName}] ADD PasswordHash VARBINARY(MAX)
-- 2. Migrate data with hashing
-- 3. Drop old column

rules.name: Foreign Key Without Index
rules.message: Foreign key column '{columnName}' in table '{tableName}' has no index
rules.recommendation: Create an index on this FK column to improve JOIN performance
